reporting_unit: Filing reports in USD millions. All monetary values multiplied by 1,000,000 to convert to raw dollars. Shares reported in millions and multiplied by 1,000,000 to convert to raw count.

company_mapping.revenue: us-gaap:Revenues — IS line item labeled Revenue
company_mapping.cogs: us-gaap:CostOfRevenue — IS line item labeled Cost of revenue
company_mapping.gross_profit: us-gaap:GrossProfit — IS line item labeled Gross profit (also computable as Revenue minus Cost of revenue)
company_mapping.operating_income: us-gaap:OperatingIncomeLoss — IS line item labeled Income from operations
company_mapping.pretax_income: us-gaap:IncomeLossFromContinuingOperationsBeforeIncomeTaxesExtraordinaryItemsNoncontrollingInterest — IS line item labeled Income before income tax
company_mapping.income_tax_expense: us-gaap:IncomeTaxExpenseBenefit — IS line item labeled Income tax expense
company_mapping.net_income: us-gaap:NetIncomeLoss — IS line item labeled Net income; confirmed same value used as CF starting line (2043M for current period); no NCI so consolidated equals parent
company_mapping.interest_expense: us-gaap:InterestExpense — IS line item labeled Interest expense, reported as gross expense (66M current period); filing discloses interest income and interest expense separately so gross interest expense is used as the conservative denominator; stored as negative per policy
company_mapping.sbc: us-gaap:AllocatedShareBasedCompensationExpense — CF addback labeled Stock-based compensation expense (735M). Note: equity statement shows 743M APIC recognition but CF addback of 735M is the canonical source per metric rules
company_mapping.dna: us-gaap:DepreciationDepletionAndAmortization — CF addback labeled Depreciation and amortization (384M); this is the total D&A addback used for all metrics; intangible amortization detail of 181M available in Note 9 (us-gaap:AmortizationOfIntangibleAssets) but the CF aggregate is the canonical source
company_mapping.diluted_shares: us-gaap:WeightedAverageNumberOfDilutedSharesOutstanding — IS line item labeled Weighted average shares - Diluted (2490M shares, converted to raw count 2,490,000,000)
company_mapping.cash: us-gaap:CashAndCashEquivalentsAtCarryingValue — BS line item labeled Cash and cash equivalents
company_mapping.short_term_investments: us-gaap:MarketableSecuritiesCurrent — BS line item labeled Marketable securities (current); confirmed by Note 7 disclosure
company_mapping.accounts_receivable: us-gaap:AccountsReceivableNetCurrent — BS line item labeled Accounts receivable, net; pure trade AR, no combined line requiring breakout
company_mapping.inventory: us-gaap:InventoryNet — BS line item labeled Inventories; detail breakout available in Note 10 (raw materials 1809M, WIP 930M, finished goods 1872M per XBRL notes)
company_mapping.accounts_payable: us-gaap:AccountsPayableCurrent — BS line item labeled Accounts payable; reported as a separate line item so no breakout from a combined line is needed
company_mapping.total_assets: us-gaap:Assets — BS line item labeled Total assets
company_mapping.equity: us-gaap:StockholdersEquity — BS line item labeled Total shareholders equity; no NCI present so this equals consolidated equity
company_mapping.short_term_debt: us-gaap:DebtCurrent — BS line item labeled Short-term debt (1250M); confirmed by Note 12 XBRL (us-gaap:LongTermDebtCurrent = 1250M) as current portion of long-term notes; us-gaap:CommercialPaper = 0 per Note 12
company_mapping.long_term_debt: us-gaap:LongTermDebtNoncurrent — BS line item labeled Long-term debt (9704M); Note 12 discloses total net carrying amount of 10954M split as 1250M current and 9704M noncurrent
company_mapping.operating_lease_liabilities: Total operating lease liabilities = current (us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiabilityCurrent from XBRL notes = 187M, embedded in Accrued and other current liabilities on BS) plus non-current (us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiabilityNoncurrent on BS face = 939M); total = 1126M, confirmed by us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiability = 1126M in Note 3 maturity reconciliation. Current portion NOT separately broken out on BS face but disclosed in Note 10 and Note 3.
company_mapping.cfo: us-gaap:NetCashProvidedByUsedInOperatingActivities — CF line item labeled Net cash provided by operating activities
company_mapping.capex: nvda:PurchasesOfPropertyAndEquipmentAndIntangibleAssets — CF investing line item labeled Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets (-248M); NVDA uses a combined capex line that includes intangible asset purchases; stored as negative per policy
company_mapping.acquisitions: us-gaap:PaymentsToAcquireBusinessesNetOfCashAcquired — CF investing line item labeled Acquisitions, net of cash acquired (-83M); stored as negative per policy
company_mapping.rd_expense: us-gaap:ResearchAndDevelopmentExpense — IS line item labeled Research and development
company_mapping.interest_income: us-gaap:InvestmentIncomeInterest — IS line item labeled Interest income; needed for metric 21 (Unlevered FCF) context and net debt context
company_mapping.operating_lease_liabilities_current: us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiabilityCurrent from XBRL notes (Note 10 / Note 3) = 187M at 2023-04-30; embedded within Accrued and other current liabilities on BS face
company_mapping.operating_lease_liabilities_noncurrent: us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiabilityNoncurrent — BS line item labeled Long-term operating lease liabilities = 939M
company_mapping.cash_paid_for_interest: Not separately disclosed in this 10-Q filing supplemental section; approximate with income-statement interest expense per metric 21 fallback rule
company_mapping.amortization_of_intangibles: us-gaap:AmortizationOfIntangibleAssets from Note 9 XBRL = 181M; sub-component of total D&A of 384M
